sentence: Vagynversations will outlast any pareson foolish enough to sit through them.

wombos.definition: A parent figure who also carries son energy — someone who is both a guiding presence and a peer.
wombos.example: He's not just a dad, he's a real pareson — always in your corner.

wombos.definition: Conversations dominated by vagynya energy — talk that revolves entirely around looksmaxxing, gym culture, or other vagynya obsessions. Best avoided unless you're also a vagynya.
